title: M.C. Mehta vs Union Of India & Ors
summary: Absolute liability principle established in the Oleum Gas Leak Case under Article 32.
text:
This is an abbreviated text representation of the judgment in M.C. Mehta vs Union Of India & Ors sourced from Indian Kanoon for RAG purposes.

The court held that absolute liability principle established in the oleum gas leak case under article 32..
